title: Raven the Little Rascal: Hunt for the Lost Treasure
original_title: Der kleine Rabe Socke - Suche nach dem verlorenen Schatz
overview: Little Raven and his friends embark on a big treasure hunt. Competing against the beavers they have to solve riddles and navigate great dangers in order to finally find the most surprising of all treasures. Based on the books by Nele Moost and Annet Rudolph.
